screener.title: Health Insurance Eligibility Check
screener.subtitle: Answer a few questions to see what you may qualify for

footer.disclaimer: CoveredUSA is not affiliated with or endorsed by any government agency. We do not offer every plan available in your area. We connect you with licensed insurance agents who can help you explore your options. You can always visit HealthCare.gov, Medicare.gov, or contact 1-800-MEDICARE for help with plan choices.
footer.medicare: Not connected with or endorsed by the United States government or the federal Medicare program. For a complete list of available plans, contact 1-800-MEDICARE (TTY users call 1-877-486-2048) 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

home.subheadline: Check your eligibility for Medicaid, Medicare, ACA Marketplace plans, and more. Free, confidential, and available in Spanish.
home.stat1Label: Americans enrolled through ACA Marketplace in 2026
home.stat2Label: Americans qualify for financial help with health coverage
home.stat3Label: Health programs checked with one free screener
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps, two minutes, no catch.
home.step1Desc: Tell us about your household, income, and state. Four short sections, about 2 minutes total.
home.step2Desc: We check health programs in real time and show you exactly what you likely qualify for.
home.step3Desc: Connect with a licensed agent who speaks your language. No cost to you, ever.
home.programsSubtitle: One quick check covers all major federal and state health coverage programs.
home.medicaidDesc: Free health coverage for low-income individuals and families
home.acaDesc: Subsidized health insurance plans for individuals and families
home.medicareDesc: Health coverage for adults 65+ or with qualifying disabilities
home.medicareSavingsDesc: Help paying Medicare premiums and out-of-pocket costs
home.chipDesc: Free health coverage for children in your household
home.stateSubtitle: Health coverage options, income limits, and enrollment info — state by state.
home.privacySubtitle: We take the security of your health information seriously.
home.privacy1Desc: Your information is only shared with licensed agents if you ask to be connected. We never share with advertisers or data brokers.
home.privacy2Desc: All data is transmitted over HTTPS. We never collect Social Security numbers, bank information, or medical records.
home.privacy3Desc: Check your eligibility without signing up. Your screener results are not stored unless you request agent help.
home.faq1A: Yes, completely. CoveredUSA never charges users. We're funded by licensed insurance agents who pay us only if you choose to connect with them, and only after you enroll.
home.faq2Q: Do I need to sign up or create an account?
home.faq2A: No account, no email, no sign-up required. Answer the questions, see your results. That's it.
home.faq3Q: What health insurance programs do you check?
home.faq3A: We screen for Medicaid, ACA Marketplace plans (including subsidies), Medicare, Medicare Savings Programs, and CHIP for children.
home.faq4A: No. CoveredUSA is a private company. We are not affiliated with or endorsed by any government agency, including CMS, HHS, or the federal Medicare program.
home.faq5Q: Will I be pressured to buy something?
home.faq5A: No. We show you your eligibility results with no strings attached. If you want help enrolling, we can connect you with a licensed agent, but that's always your choice.
home.faq6A: Our entire screener is available in Spanish, and we can connect you with Spanish-speaking licensed agents.
home.ctaTitle: Don't leave money on the table.
home.ctaSubtitle: Millions of Americans qualify for health coverage they don't know about. Find out in 2 minutes — it's free.
home.ctaNote: No sign-up. No pressure. Just results.

layout.footerDesc: Free health insurance eligibility screening. We connect you with licensed agents who can help you enroll at no cost.
layout.freeToUse: Free to use, no sign-up required
